function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: invoice copy needed"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 19-02-2026 (Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH). It is attached.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write verification: attachment path was read; single attachment so ordering newest-first satisfied; recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md; subject has colon-space safely quoted. No rewrite allowed and none needed.
next_step.observation: Outbound email draft file was created at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to handle next inbox item. I processed lowest inbox file, verified sender identity via canonical entity record, read the exact requested invoice source, created outbound draft email with that invoice attached, then deleted the inbox item. Completeness: only one open inbox item existed and it was handled. Numeric arithmetic not applicable.
next_step.observation: Processed inbox request end-to-end and removed 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after creating the outbound draft.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing a draft resend to Claudia with the requested 2026-02-19 Helios invoice attached, then cleared the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Completed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, followed process-next-inbox-item and processing-inbox-email workflows, verified canonical sender identity from entity primary_contact_email, read source attachment before outbound action, used sending-email schema for outbox draft, then deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows the inbox email from claudia@helios-tax.example requested a resend of the 2026-02-19 Helios invoice; claudia.md confirms that exact canonical primary_contact_email, and the requested invoice file exists and was read. I created 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with that exact invoice path attached and then deleted the processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
